text: Many experts predict that general AI, or AGI, will be developed within the next few decades. AGI would be able to think and learn like a human, performing any intellectual task we can. Potential benefits are huge: it could help solve climate change, cure diseases, and increase productivity. However, AGI also presents risks. It might be used for harmful purposes or act in unexpected ways that humans cannot control. Some believe that without careful planning, advanced AI could even threaten our jobs or safety. While timelines vary, the general consensus is that progress will accelerate. As we move forward, it is crucial to build safe and ethical AI systems.
